overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character exploring a dimly lit industrial facility. The character walks through narrow maintenance corridors and enters a cafeteria area with other characters seated at tables, all rendered with cinematic lighting and atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow maintenance corridor with exposed piping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit industrial corridor with metal shelving on the left

entered.detail: large vertical pipes and valves along the corridor wall
tall metal storage shelves with boxes
arched doorway leading to the next area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, hazy industrial corridor lined with exposed pipes and metal shelving. The warm artificial lighting casts long shadows on the metal floor plates as the character approaches an archway at the end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cafeteria with bar and dining tables

events.description: exits narrow corridor through archway into open cafeteria area with bar and tables

agents.ego_description: walking into the common area and passing by the bar counter on the left

notable_agents.action: person sitting on stool at the bar counter
person standing near the back wall by the crates

entered.detail: long metal counter with stools and bottles
wooden crates stacked against the back wall

segments.scene_description: Passing through the archway, the scene opens into a larger cafeteria space with a bar on the left and round dining tables scattered throughout. Two NPCs are visible—one seated at the bar and another standing near stacked crates in the back—while the character continues walking toward the far side of the room.

events.description: approaching and entering doorway leading to next corridor

agents.ego_description: walking past seated individuals at tables toward the exit corridor on the far side

notable_agents.action: person sitting at round table reading or working
person still seated at bar counter in background

entered.detail: doorway leading to the next corridor section
vertical poster on wall with orange and black graphics

segments.scene_description: The character continues across the cafeteria, passing a seated NPC at a table on the right. A mining poster and emergency light fixture are visible on the right wall as the character approaches and enters the exit doorway, transitioning into another corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial hallway into a spacious communal cafeteria before returning to a narrow passage. It begins with the character navigating a hazy corridor lined with exposed pipes and metal shelving, where warm artificial lighting casts long shadows across the floor. As the character passes through an archway, the space opens into a larger cafeteria featuring a bar and scattered dining tables with NPCs positioned nearby. The camera then tracks across the room, passing a seated figure and a mining poster on the wall, while the atmospheric haze persists. Finally, the scene narrows once more as the character reaches the far side of the room and enters an exit doorway, transitioning back into another corridor.
